case_title: ISAIAS ESTRADA VS. FRANCES MORALES, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA FRANCY'S

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, ISAIAS AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCES MORALES, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA FRANCY'S GENERAL GARDENING AKA FRANCES GENERAL GARDENING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
